description: 167 Guild Wiki — Animation and Transition Design Tokens. Transitions should feel deliberate — not sluggish, not instant.

duration-instant.$description: No animation. For elements that must update immediately.

duration-fast.$description: Fast micro-interactions. Button clicks, focus rings.

duration-base.$description: Default transition duration. Color changes, opacity.

duration-slow.$description: Slow transitions. Panel reveals, dropdown menus.

duration-slower.$description: Deliberate reveals. Page-level transitions, dramatic effects.

easing-linear.$description: Linear easing. Continuous motion like progress bars.

easing-ease.$description: Default easing. Natural feel for most transitions.

easing-ease-in-out.$description: Ease in-out. Balanced transitions with smooth start and end.

easing-dramatic.$description: Material-style dramatic curve. For impactful state changes.
